seoTitle: Wabonga vs Waggarandall — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wabonga and Waggarandall. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wabonga and Waggarandall.
heading: Wabonga vs Waggarandall — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wabonga, Victoria and Waggarandall, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wabonga and Waggarandall have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Wabonga or Waggarandall safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wabonga has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Waggarandall scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wabonga scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Waggarandall scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wabonga or Waggarandall?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wabonga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
